content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.nexus
FILE: cosmos/core/nexus.py (161 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Nexus: The Neural Event Bus.

The Nexus is the central nervous system of cosmos v1.3.
It replaces traditional "function calls" with a high-speed, asynchronous event bus
that allows the Agent Swarm to coordinate in real-time.

UPDATES:
- Added Middleware pipeline support
- Added Priority Queue

CLASSES:
- SignalType(Enum)
- Signal: A quantified event propagating through the Nexus.
- Nexus: The central event bus with Neural Routing and Middleware.
  Methods: def get_instance(cls)
  Methods: def subscribe(self, signal_type: SignalType, handler: Callable[[Signal], Awaitable[None]])
  Methods: def add_middleware(self, func: MiddlewareFunc)
  Methods: async def broadcast(self, signal: Signal)
  Methods: async def emit(self, type: SignalType, payload: dict, source: str, urgency: float=0.5)
  Methods: def inspection_black_box(self, last_n: int=10) -> list[Signal]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def logging_middleware(signal: Signal) -> bool
